auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Scrapingdog API key passed with the api_key query parameter. Get it from the official member area: https://api.scrapingdog.com/login.

actions.name: fetch_html
actions.description: Fetch the HTML response for one target URL through the Scrapingdog Web Scraping API.

url.description: The decoded target URL to scrape.

dynamic.description: Whether Scrapingdog should render JavaScript for the target page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a web page through Scrapingdog.

html.description: The HTML or text content returned by Scrapingdog.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by Scrapingdog.

contentType.description: The response content type returned by Scrapingdog.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for fetching a web page through Scrapingdog.

actions.name: get_account_usage
actions.description: Retrieve Scrapingdog account usage and credit information for the API key.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Scrapingdog account usage.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON-compatible value returned by Scrapingdog.

usage.description: The JSON object returned by Scrapingdog for this request.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for Scrapingdog account usage.

actions.name: google_maps_place
actions.description: Retrieve details for one Google Maps place through Scrapingdog.

dataId.description: The Google Maps data ID for a place.

country.description: The two-letter country code used for localized results.

type.description: The Google Maps place request type.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Google Maps place through Scrapingdog.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON-compatible value returned by Scrapingdog.

data.description: The JSON object returned by Scrapingdog for this request.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Scrapingdog Google Maps Places request.

actions.name: google_maps_search
actions.description: Run a Google Maps Search request through Scrapingdog.

ll.description: The GPS coordinate origin used by Google Maps, such as @40.745,-74,15z.

domain.description: The Google domain to use for Google Maps results.

language.description: The language code for localized Google Maps results.

country.description: The two-letter country code used for localized results.

page.description: The Google Maps Search page number, starting at 0.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for running a Google Maps Search request through Scrapingdog.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON-compatible value returned by Scrapingdog.

data.description: The JSON object returned by Scrapingdog for this request.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Scrapingdog Google Maps Search request.

actions.name: google_scholar_search
actions.description: Run a Google Scholar search request through Scrapingdog.

html.description: Whether Scrapingdog should return raw Google Scholar HTML.

country.description: The two-letter country code used for localized results.

language.description: The language code for localized Google Scholar results.

lr.description: The Google Scholar language restriction value, such as lang_en.

cites.description: The Google Scholar cited-by article ID.

cluster.description: The Google Scholar article cluster ID.

asSdt.description: The Google Scholar search type or patent/case law filter.

safe.description: The Google Scholar safe search setting.

filter.description: Whether to enable Google's similar and omitted result filters.

asVis.description: Whether citations should be excluded from Scholar results.

asRr.description: Whether only review articles should be returned.

page.description: The Google Scholar page number, starting at 0.

results.description: The number of Google Scholar results to request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for running a Google Scholar search request through Scrapingdog.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON-compatible value returned by Scrapingdog.

data.description: The JSON object returned by Scrapingdog for this request.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Scrapingdog Google Scholar Search request.

actions.name: google_search
actions.description: Run a Google Search request through Scrapingdog and return parsed results.

domain.description: The Google domain to use, such as google.com or google.co.uk.

country.description: The two-letter country code used for localized results.

cr.description: The Google country restriction filter, such as countryUS.

location.description: The origin location for the Google search.

language.description: The Google language code for result localization.

lr.description: The Google language restriction value, such as lang_en.

ludocid.description: The Google Business listing ID to extract.

lsig.description: The Google lsig parameter used for some knowledge graph views.

kgmid.description: The Google Knowledge Graph ID to scrape.

si.description: The cached Google search parameter string.

tbs.description: The advanced Google search filter string.

nfpr.description: Whether to exclude results for an auto-corrected query.

filter.description: Whether to enable Google's similar and omitted result filters.

page.description: The Google Search page number, starting at 0.

results.description: The number of Google Search results to request.

advanceSearch.description: Whether to request Scrapingdog advanced Google Search parsing.

mobSearch.description: Whether to request mobile Google Search results.

html.description: Whether Scrapingdog should return full Google result page HTML.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for running a Google Search request through Scrapingdog.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON-compatible value returned by Scrapingdog.

data.description: The JSON object returned by Scrapingdog for this request.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for a Scrapingdog Google Search request.
